name: Cain Velasquez
oneLiner: The heavyweight pressure machine: elite pace, wrestling, cardio, and one of the best primes in UFC heavyweight history.
compareShortCase: Cain is the heavyweight peak-destruction case: brutal pace, wrestling, cardio, title wins, and a prime that looked terrifying before injuries shortened the resume.
compareCounter: The argument against Cain is availability and volume. The peak was huge, but the resume does not have Stipe's depth or title-fight total.
